title: No Tables, No Chairs Parade & Concert
description: Mausiki Scales & the Common Ground Collective's iconic funk-filled journey through the rhythms of the African Diaspora. All-day festival with DJs, parade, food vendors, and an evening concert on the meadow. Perfect for couples who love music, culture, and outdoor vibes. Wear your dancing shoes and join the Funk-line parade!

title: Pours & Punchlines Comedy Showcase
location: Pour Taproom-Beltline, 661 Auburn Ave NE, Atlanta
description: The Beltline's hottest comedy show returns! Atlanta's best comedians (network TV, famous clubs, social media) perform at this intimate taproom. Pay-by-the-oz craft beer (no two-item minimum), plus NY-style pizza from Pizza Dynamo. Great date night for couples who love to laugh.

title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends - Atlanta
location: BLOCK & DRUM, 5105 Peachtree Blvd Bldg B, Chamblee, GA
description: The #UnapologeticallyAfrican experience returns to Atlanta! Amapiano, Afrobeats & more with DJs NANI, POKO, TKRUNDAT, NECII. Seven hours of African music & culture. Free parking at Walmart or Keswick Park (short walk). Great vibes for couples who love to dance and celebrate African music.

title: The Black Keys: PEACHES 'N KREAM
description: Legendary rock duo The Black Keys perform at Atlanta's historic Tabernacle with special guest Miles Kane. Iconic venue with great acoustics and sightlines. Perfect date night for rock fans - tickets are pricy but it's a memorable live music experience. Dress up, make a night of it.

title: Bachata X Zouk ATL Weekender 2026
location: 5522 New Peachtree Rd STE 103, Chamblee, GA
description: Three days of Bachata and Zouk dancing! Workshops, socials, performances. Great for couples who want to learn or improve dancing together. Full pass gives access to all events. Chamblee has great Cuban and Asian food nearby. Day passes available.

title: Atlanta Contemporary - Free Art Exhibitions
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 724 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Free admission to world-class contemporary art. Current shows include Brittany Adeline King's 'Dokafleh' and the Johnson Publishing Company Archives 'Rejoice, Resist, Rest' (Images of Black Liberation). Great couples activity - explore together, then grab coffee in West Midtown.

title: Natalie Rose Eddings: A Litany for Shelter
description: Outdoor installation at Atlanta Contemporary. Thought-provoking, site-specific work. The outdoor setting makes it a unique gallery experience - great for couples who enjoy combining art with a walk through the sculpture garden area.

title: Whole World Improv Theatre - Classic Improv Show
description: Award-winning improv comedy show! Spontaneous laughter at Atlanta's nonprofit improv theater. Perfect for couples who think on their feet and enjoy interactive comedy. Great date night that supports local arts.

title: Bachata Class + Latin Night at Tortugas
time: Doors 7 PM, class 7:30 PM, dancing after
description: 2-hour Bachata lesson followed by Latin dancing at Atlanta's beloved Cuban institution. Start with the dance lesson (no partner needed), then stay for the party. Tortugas has amazing Cuban food, mojitos, and a lively atmosphere. Budget-friendly date that includes dinner and dancing.

title: Atlanta Veg Week 2026
description: Citywide celebration of plant-powered eating! Dozens of Atlanta restaurants offer special vegan menus. Great for couples exploring vegetarian/vegan cuisine together. Check website for participating restaurants and events throughout the week.
